message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "User" as User
rectangle "QueryParser" as QueryParser
rectangle "Tokenizer" as Tokenizer
rectangle "QuerySet" as QuerySet
rectangle "Query" as Query
rectangle "QueryComponent" as QueryComponent

User -> QuerySet : 1 QuerySet()
User -> QuerySet : 2 add("longitude", "* /CLON")
QuerySet -> QueryParser : 3 parse(queryString)
QueryParser -> Tokenizer : 4 tokenize(queryString)
Tokenizer --> QueryParser : 5 tokens

loop [all sub-queries]
  QueryParser -> Query : 6 Query()
  loop [all components]
    QueryParser -> QueryComponent : 7 QueryComponent()
    QueryParser -> QueryParser : 8 push_back(component)
  end
end

QueryParser --> QuerySet : 9 queries

@enduml
